title: Replace `case` on a literal atom with `if` binding idiom
prompt: Given: `def find_author(id) do case MyApp.Users.get_author(id) do nil -> :anon; author -> author end end`. Rewrite using the `if var = expr` binding idiom: `if author = MyApp.Users.get_author(id), do: author, else: :anon`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Authors do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Direct application of dnautics-idiom. Counts as medium because Sonnet consistently reaches for `case` first.
